heading: Disposition of funds
label: 496 Disposition of funds
text: All funds arising from the privileges granted under shall be covered into the Treasury of the United States as provided by law.section 495 of this title
notes: CodificationAs enacted by act , section provided that the funds be “covered into the Treasury of the United States as a special fund, to be expended in the care of public forest reservations”.Feb. 28, 1899Section was affected by act , which provides that all revenue from the national forests shall be covered into the Treasury as a miscellaneous receipt.Mar. 4, 1907
